observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
import json
with open('build/test/task2/functional-0/001_var_defn.sysu.c/answer.json') as f:
    j = json.load(f)
# Check the VarDecl inner structure
for item in j['inner']:
    if item['kind'] == 'VarDecl':
        print('VarDecl name:', item.get('name'))
        print('  inner:', item.get('inner', []))
        for inner in item.get('inner', []):
            print('    inner kind:', inner.get('kind'), 'val:', inner.get('value'))
"
